title: ANC - changes are present after closing/opening the ANC tab
scenario: ANC settings do not persist after closing and reopening the ANC tab in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Tap on ANC to open the ANC tab
Adjust ANC values (e.g., change slider positions or toggle ANC modes)
Close the ANC tab (e.g., tap Back or navigate away)
Reopen the ANC tab by following the same path: Audio Settings → ANC
expected: The ANC settings should retain the previously set values after closing and reopening the ANC tab.
